creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is more of a "request for support" than "problem report", which is 
what we use this database for. 

A good place to start is the FreeBSD Handbook: 

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/ 

After that, if you have questions, you might try using the FreeBSD 
Forums: http://forums.freebsd.org/ .
